word: H4616 - מַעַן - maʻan - mah'-an - Because of

sections.paragraph:
Original: מען

Transliteration: ma‛an

Phonetic: mah'-an

BDB Definition:

  1. purpose, intent
    1. for the sake of
    2. in view of, on account of
    3. for the purpose of, to the intent that, in order to conjunction
    4. to the end that

Origin: from H6030

TWOT entry: 1650g

Part(s) of speech:
